candidates.why: The only explicit D&A row is a standalone operating-expense line in a nature-of-expense presentation, not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and not clearly tied specifically to the selected COGS bucket 'Raw Materials and Supplies'. To avoid misallocating group-level depreciation into COGS, do not add it to COGS_DA.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown above the financial section.

candidates.why: This is a separate same-level operating line item above EBIT, while the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows were 'Other External Costs', 'Personnel expenses', and 'Other operating expenses' and explicitly excluded depreciation. Therefore this depreciation appears outside the selected XSGA bucket and should be added separately later.

variables.notes: Use the standalone operating 'Depreciation' row once for XSGA_DA; there is no more granular SG&A/R&D D&A split visible, and no separate R&D expense row was selected.
